name: Agent Blackbox 100/100 fleet baseline
description: Post install-audit subcommand: agent-blackbox 110, ga 96, Demerzel 90, ix 71, tars 59. Original 100/100 was the older harness-audit surface; install-audit adds review-independence + observability checks, so numbers regressed. Cross-repo overseer still reports loop-eligible.

name: QA Architect Tribunal
description: Cross-repo QA verdict protocol spanning GA, Demerzel, ix, TARS. Phase 0 shipped 2026-05-02. Phase 1 implementation scheduled 2026-05-18. Schema is v0.1 draft; not frozen.

name: OPTIC-K Sparse Autoencoder
description: SAE over the 313k-voicing OPTIC-K corpus to validate partition design, discover latent musical features, and feed drift signals into the QA tribunal. Cross-repo: ix crate + GA consumer + Demerzel orchestration. Phase 1 fires 2026-05-19.

name: Chatbot skills migration (complete)
description: 23 PRs (13 migration + 10 evolution) migrating 10 IOrchestratorSkill implementations to SKILL.md. 15 canonical skills (11 fast-path + 4 catalog-only), 7 MCP tools under ga_* prefix. Multi-LLM review caught 9 bugs in migration + 11 in audits.

name: IX 6-item improvement sweep
description: 6-item IX improvement sweep — wave 1 (issues #2/#3/#4/#5) in flight 2026-05-18. Wave 2 (issue #1) fires after.

name: Epistemic Constitution (Demerzel)
description: 10 articles, 17 named concepts establishing demarcation, evidence, falsifiability, and epistemic humility norms for Demerzel governance and cross-repo tribunals.
